creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
On Wed, Nov 04, 1998 at 07:08:02PM -0000, I wrote:
> 
> I am sending a new port for KLyX, the KDE graphical front-end to LaTeX.

I've just noticed a small problem with this update. The Makefile
contains the line:
	HAS_CONFIGURE=	yes
which should read:
	GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes

If anyone commits this port, please make this small modification.

Thanks,
Tom
